nasb.text: And Jesus answered and said to him, “It is said, ‘You shall not put the Lord your God to the test.’ ”

esv.text: And Jesus answered him, “It is said, ‘You shall not put the Lord your God to the test.’”

cnv.text: 耶穌回答：“經上說：‘不可試探主你的　神。’”

ccb.text: 耶稣回答说：“圣经上说，‘不可试探主——你的上帝。’”

csbs.text: 耶稣回答说：“经上说：‘不可试探主——你的神。’”
